assertions.title: Assertions panel shows assertions in milestone detail

steps.observed: Missions view displayed with list of missions
Mission detail view shown with Structure/Activity tabs

steps.expected: Assertions list with title, status badge, linked features count
steps.observed: Assertions section visible with 'needs_coverage' badge and 'pending' status. Contains assertion title, assertion text, and Linked Features area
Inline form appeared with title field, assertion text field, and status dropdown

steps.action: Fill in title and assertion text
steps.observed: Title field and assertion text field both accept input
Assertion 'Test assertion 1' created successfully and appeared in assertions list with status 'pending'

steps.action: Toggle assertion details to see action buttons
steps.observed: Toggle details, Edit assertion, Delete assertion, and Link Feature buttons all visible
Edit form appeared with pre-populated title, assertion text, and status dropdown
Title changed to 'Test assertion 1 - EDITED' and saved successfully
After confirming delete, assertion was removed from list

assertions.title: Link features to assertions

steps.action: Click Link Feature button on assertion
steps.observed: Button click did not open any visible picker or modal

steps.action: Check if feature linking UI exists
steps.observed: No modal/picker appeared. The Linked Features section shows 'All features already linked' or 'No features linked yet' but no interactive controls to actually link/unlink features were found

assertions.issues: Link Feature button does not appear to open any feature selection interface. The functionality to actually link features to assertions appears to be missing from the UI - clicking the button has no visible effect.

frictions.description: Delete confirmation dialog was not a typical modal - just Delete/Cancel buttons appeared inline
frictions.resolution: Used the inline Delete button to confirm. Works correctly.

blockers.description: VAL-UI-004: Link Feature button does not open any feature picker or selection UI. Clicking it has no visible effect. Cannot test link/unlink functionality because the feature linking interface is not implemented or not accessible.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Clicked Link Feature button multiple times, waited for modal, tried different approaches - no picker appeared

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-UI-001, VAL-UI-002, VAL-UI-003), 1 blocked (VAL-UI-004). The assertions panel UI is functional - assertions can be created, edited, and deleted. However, the Link Feature button does not open any feature selection interface, blocking testing of VAL-UI-004.
